channel.title: pasha
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from pasha

item.title: because going to a music festival with your friends is pure happiness and pure happiness is the greatest goal and the meaning of life #coachella #comedy
item.description: because going to a music festival with your friends is pure happiness and pure happiness is the greatest goal and the meaning of life #coachella #comedy

item.title: a true friend is someone who quietly calls out the best in you - not by demanding it, but simply by existing as that better version themselves with friendships, you must feel pride in your friend’s accomplishments as if they were yours and feel as warmly
item.description: a true friend is someone who quietly calls out the best in you - not by demanding it, but simply by existing as that better version themselves with friendships, you must feel pride in your friend’s accomplishments as if they were yours and feel as warmly

item.title: are you working in tech? or are you working in… marketing 😭 because I think that you are working in marketing 😭😭 doing emails and building decks and changing cell colours in excel that is not tech or coding that is marketing and you have been exposed… if

item.title: if you’re at @coachella and not attending the @Alaska Airlines experience then I don’t know what you’re doing, summer is coming soon and Europe flights are not gonna get themselves 😭 make sure you stop by for the chance to win prizеs, flights and even Coa

item.description: when they ask you “are you in front of a computer?” 😩 of course I’m not, goodbye! #corporate #toxicmanager #careertiktok #work

item.title: if you’re a middle manager then excuse me what are even managing? no you’re not, you are not managing anything or anyone - how embarrassing! you’re forwarding tasks, scheduling meetings about meetings, creating or rearranging slide decks, adding notes to
item.description: if you’re a middle manager then excuse me what are even managing? no you’re not, you are not managing anything or anyone - how embarrassing! you’re forwarding tasks, scheduling meetings about meetings, creating or rearranging slide decks, adding notes to

item.title: people who get their coffee at some artisan cafe instead of Starbucks, Dunkin, Pret, Cafe Nerro or Costa think they are the most special people in the world #comedy #coffee
item.description: people who get their coffee at some artisan cafe instead of Starbucks, Dunkin, Pret, Cafe Nerro or Costa think they are the most special people in the world #comedy #coffee

item.title: how it feels when you read a book a public. I have no idea what’s going on, and I am focused on whether I look cute and mysterious #comedy #books #booktok
item.description: how it feels when you read a book a public. I have no idea what’s going on, and I am focused on whether I look cute and mysterious #comedy #books #booktok

item.title: someone born in 1997 once said “ah I miss the 80’s, these were some of the best years of my life!” - that person was me 🥹 #comedy #80s

item.title: please stop using these words in your day-to-day work it’s actually so embarrassing and giving people pleaser vibes: - “just” - just wanted to check in…please no just, just say “checking in to see if…” - “sorry to bother you” or literally any sorry! you
item.description: please stop using these words in your day-to-day work it’s actually so embarrassing and giving people pleaser vibes: - “just” - just wanted to check in…please no just, just say “checking in to see if…” - “sorry to bother you” or literally any sorry! you

item.description: Barry’s is a lifestyle… #comedy #barrys

item.title: because the fastest way to feel happy is to make someone else happy and that’s exactly what helping does! 😊 and achieving happiness is our greatest goal and the meaning of our life! of course this is completely off character. who cares if they’re happy or

item.title: one piece of propagandа I’ll never fall for is hating on America when you were lucky enough to be born here… some of us had to work so hard just to get here - years of paperwork makes you appreciate it differently. it’s easy to complain about home when yo
item.description: one piece of propagandа I’ll never fall for is hating on America when you were lucky enough to be born here… some of us had to work so hard just to get here - years of paperwork makes you appreciate it differently. it’s easy to complain about home when yo
